title: June 3
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|June|hide31=yes}}

'''June 3''' is the 154th day of the year (155th in leap years), with 211 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1930s#1930|1930]] – [[Morris Bush]] is born.
*[[1982]] – [[Sebastian Armesto]] is born.
*[[1989]] – [[Megumi Han]] is born.
*[[1991]] – [[Vince Colletta]] dies.
*[[1998]] – ''[[Jabba the Hutt: The Art of the Deal]]'' published.
*[[2002]] – ''[[Star Wars: A Long Time Ago... Volume 1: Doomworld]]'' published.
*[[2003]] – [[Shatterpoint (novel)|''Shatterpoint'']] published.
*2003 – [[Star Wars Insider 68|''Star Wars Insider'' 68]] published.
*[[2011]] – ''[[Star Tours: The Adventures Continue]]'' launches at [[Disneyland]].
*2011 – Lee J. Ames dies.
*[[2013]] – ''[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars: Episode Guide]]'' published.
*[[2015]] – [[Princess Leia 4|''Princess Leia'' 4]] published.
*2015 – [[Darth Vader (2015) 6|''Darth Vader'' (2015) 6]] published.
*2015 – [[Star Wars (2015) 6|''Star Wars'' (2015) 6]] published.
*2015 – ''[[Star Wars: The Original Marvel Years Omnibus Vol. 2]]'' released.
*[[2019]] – [[Paul Darrow]] dies.
*[[2025]] – ''[[Rogue Planet]]'' reprinted as part of ''The Essential Legends Collection''.
*2025 – [[Rogue Planet (unabridged audiobook)|''Rogue Planet'' unabridged audiobook]] released as part of ''The Essential Legends Collection''.
*2025 – [[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire (novel)|''Shadows of the Empire'']] reprinted as part of ''The Essential Legends Collection''.
*2025 – [[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire (unabridged audiobook)|''Shadows of the Empire'' unabridged audiobook]] released as part of ''The Essential Legends Collection''.
*2025 – ''[[Star Wars: Battle of Jakku (trade paperback)]]'' published.
*[[2026]] – [[Rogue One – Jyn Erso 1|''Rogue One – Jyn Erso'' 1]] to be published.
